description: Draw a form's entry bounding boxes (red) and label bounding boxes (blue) for one page onto a rendered page image, for visual verification of proposed field coordinates. Wraps PIL.
rules: reads a fields JSON + an input page image; writes a new annotated PNG
only fields whose page_number matches PAGE_NUMBER are drawn
annotated image is written to record_store/validation_page.png; a manifest line goes to validation_image.txt
needs Pillow (PIL) at runtime; absent -> manifest note + exit 0
usage: Set PAGE_NUMBER, FIELDS_JSON (with a form_fields array), and PAGE_IMAGE (the rendered page PNG). Outputs: validation_page.png + validation_image.txt.
limitation: Operates in image pixel coordinates; the fields JSON must use the same coordinate space as PAGE_IMAGE. Requires Pillow.
